prestazioni: Engine: EP6CDT (1.6L THP 175hp stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 86.5mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 300+ hp reliably. Stock crank remains but balanced to 0.5g tolerance.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT2867 .64 A/R turbo with TiAL 44mm MV-R wastegate and custom 3-inch stainless downpipe (no cat) paired with a CSF high-flow intercooler (bar-and-plate core, 60% larger than OEM) and Vibrant 1482 silicone couplers.

Fuel System: Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pump (340 LPH) with Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors (1000cc/min), AEM 340lph in-tank pump, and custom 3/8" fuel lines with AN-6 fittings. ECU reflash via Syvecs S6Plus standalone (OEM ECU retained for diagnostics only).
estetica: Body Kit: Peugeot Sport official 207 RC WRC replica front bumper with carbon fiber splitter (3M VHB tape mounting, no drilling) and custom rear diffuser by Maxton Design (polyurethane, bolt-on for OEM rear bumper).
Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 17x8 +35 ET in Anthracite with 215/40/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (stretched 10mm for aggressive fitment). Front fenders rolled with heat gun, no cutting.

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (fixed-back, 9kg lighter than OEM) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, bolt-in, no welding) with powder-coated matte black finish. OMP steering wheel (330mm, suede) with quick-release hub.
